calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Chloe Scullin and Yana Bogosian. Edward Scullin in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that its interpretation is that Christine's share is in fact a provisional heir and that the property under German Law should pass as requested in this petition. Mr. Scullin stated that he is fine with the settlement. The Court approved the accounting petition and request to approve the agreement between Beneficiaries, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Continued To May-27-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-06-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Ross Madden for Chloe Scullin and Yana Bogosian (Petitioners).

The Court stated that this is a request to have the Court determined the validity of the claims because the co-administrators cannot agree and that it is the administrators' job to make the proposal. Mr. Madden argued that the claims must be presented to the Court for approval. The Court questioned if there may be a conflict of interest in Mr. Madden representing both of the administrators. The Petition for Instructions is denied without prejudice.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3332 Folsom St., San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for and with Chloe Scullin.

The sale was confirmed at $675,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on June 13, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (3332 Folsom St., San Francisco, Ca 94110)
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Continued To Aug-08-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Chloe Scullin.

The Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to August 8, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for publication. The Court shortened time on publication to seven days. Mr. Madden will submit a declaration addressing the issue of Christine offering the property to her Sister Anne first.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-22-2010 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Sep-15-2010 Continued To Sep-22-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-14-2010 Continued To Sep-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ross Madden for Chloe Scullin.

Mr. Madden stated that the entire administration of the Estate was in Germany, that the house in San Francisco was bequeathed to the Decedent's Daughter, that the Daughter is deceased and that the Grandaughter was the petitioner. In addition, he stated that the declination from Valentin Schafer was coming from Germany, that the other Grandaughter was asking to be Co-Petitioner, that they were asking to waive bond, that there was no Personal Representative for Christine's (Daughter of Decedent) estate and that Christine died intestate. The Court stated that a declination from both Executors Mr. Schafer and Dr. Kramuschke was needed. The matter was continued to September 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.
